---
title: "🗓️ Unit 7- Spectral harmonization"
---

In this week, the first part will be dedicated to the *Examen No. 1*

Then, we will have a session for understanding what spectral harmonization is. Furthermore, we will have the opportunity to reproduce a case study using an useful Python tool.


## 👨‍🏫 Lecture Slides 

Click [here](slides.qmd) to view the slides.

🎥 

## ✍️ Coursework

🚧   
Upload your *Informe No. 1* to the drive not later than on 24.03.2026 at 11:59 pm.
🚧
